About the Space

Luxury Studio on Prestigious Al Maryah Island

Ideal for ADGM professionals, business travelers & Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi visitors. 5-minute walk to The Galleria Mall: world-class dining, shopping & entertainment.


Muji-inspired interiors for a true boutique-hotel feel. Breathtaking waterfront views from your private balcony. Nespresso machine, hotel-grade La'Marvel linens, high-speed WiFi, covered parking, swimming swimming pool & gym.

Self Check-in
Seamless lockbox, contactless arrival
Swimming Pool
Stunning skyline views from pool deck
New Construction
Premium finishes, modern interiors
DCT Licensed
Fully compliant Abu Dhabi holiday home
